name: Eagle Lakes Golf Academy and Driving Range
description: Situated just minutes from Old Naples and Marco Island, Eagle Lakes Golf Club offers a par-72 championship course designed around 21 lakes with five tee options ranging from 4,466 to 7,144 yards. The course underwent a full renovation in 2024, including new Bimini Bermuda fairways, and now features one of the most scenic layouts in Southwest Florida. Golfers can refine their game at the full practice facility or book personalized instruction with an on-site PGA professional. A bar and restaurant round out the experience, making it a great stop for both competitive rounds and casual outings.

name: Orange County National Driving Range
description: Named one of the best driving ranges in the country by Golfer Magazine, the Orange County National Driving Range in Winter Garden is also recognized as the largest range in the nation. Sprawling grass hitting areas give golfers the feel of a real course, and the facility is large enough to have hosted PGA Merchandise Show Demo Days. A pro shop, on-site restaurant and bar, and well-maintained facilities make it a complete practice destination just outside of Orlando. Whether you're warming up for a round or spending the afternoon working on distance, it's hard to beat the scale and quality here.

name: Rio Pinar Driving Range
description: Rio Pinar has been a landmark of Central Florida golf since 1957, having hosted multiple PGA Tour events that helped establish the region as a serious golf destination. The driving range features TrackMan technology for advanced swing analysis alongside lit hitting bays that extend play into the evening hours. A bar and restaurant on-site mean golfers can grab a meal or a drink before or after their session. The combination of rich golfing history and modern practice technology makes Rio Pinar a distinctive stop for Orlando-area players.

name: Falcon Watch Golf Driving Range
address: 1000 Kings Blvd, Sun City Center, FL 33573
description: Located in the Sun City Center retirement community, Falcon Watch Golf Driving Range serves as a convenient local practice spot for golfers in this active adult community. The open-air range offers a straightforward place to warm up or work on ball-striking without the overhead of a full country club. The relaxed, community-oriented atmosphere suits casual players who prefer a low-key setting over a busy commercial facility. It's a neighborhood gem that keeps the local golfing community sharp and active.

name: Calusa Country Club At Lakewood Ranch
description: Calusa Country Club at Lakewood Ranch offers a private club golf experience within one of Southwest Florida's most sought-after master-planned communities. The course is complemented by a full suite of club amenities including dining, making it a social hub as much as a golf destination. Membership provides access to a well-maintained course and the camaraderie of a tight-knit residential golfing community. It's a refined option for Lakewood Ranch residents seeking a club that matches the quality of their surroundings.

name: Glynlea Country Club
address: 10942 NW Furyk Drive, Port St. Lucie, FL 34987
description: Glynlea Country Club in Jacksonville's historic Ortega neighborhood blends a traditional private club experience with modern Toptracer Range technology on its practice facilities. Members enjoy access to a dining room, social events, and golf in an established community setting that dates back decades. The addition of Toptracer brings game-improvement data and interactive games to the range, giving the club's practice area a contemporary edge. It's a club that honors its traditions while keeping pace with the technology players expect today.

name: The Classics Country Club
description: The Classics Country Club in Naples sits within the prestigious Lely Resort community and offers public tee times alongside its private membership options, giving more golfers access to a well-regarded course. The club features the Flamingo and Mustang championship layouts, both known for their scenic design and competitive challenge. A full dining program and active event calendar make the club a social destination as much as a golf venue. It's a refined but welcoming option for golfers seeking a genuine country club experience in Naples.

name: Eagles Edge Toptracer Range
description: Eagles Edge at the Omni Orlando Resort in ChampionsGate is an entertainment-forward driving range featuring 30 Toptracer-powered hitting bays set against a backdrop of chef-crafted dining and creative cocktails. The range brings a lively, stadium-style atmosphere to the outdoor experience, with multiple food and beverage options available at each bay. Toptracer technology lets golfers play virtual courses, compete in games, or track real ball-flight data, making every session both fun and informative. It's a standout choice for groups, families, and resort guests looking for an elevated outdoor entertainment experience near Orlando.

name: Space Coast Golf Club Bar & Grille
description: Space Coast Golf Club Bar and Grille on Merritt Island offers a relaxed combination of golf and casual dining on Florida's Atlantic coast. The facility serves as a social gathering spot for local golfers who enjoy unwinding with food and drinks after their rounds. Its Brevard County location makes it convenient for golfers throughout the Space Coast corridor from Titusville to Palm Bay. The bar and grille atmosphere creates a welcoming community hub centered around the shared love of the game.

name: Legacy Golf Range/Par3
description: Legacy Golf Club in Panama City features a nine-hole executive par-3 course with Zoysia greens, giving golfers a fast, scenic alternative to a full-length round. The course operates on a first-come, first-served basis with no tee time required, making it a flexible and accessible option for all schedules. Lit bays allow golfers to continue range practice well into the evening, and on-site food and beverage options keep the experience comfortable. Whether warming up with a bucket of balls or walking the short course, Legacy offers solid value for local players.

name: Inlet Golf Range
address: 4116 S Nova Rd, Port Orange, FL 32127
description: Inlet Golf Range in Port Orange is a neighborhood practice facility offering covered mat bays, a grass area, and chipping and putting greens to support all aspects of short-game development. Evening lights extend practice sessions well past sunset, a practical feature in Florida's summer heat. Golf clinics are available for players looking for group instruction in a casual setting. It's a solid, unpretentious range for Volusia County golfers who want consistent access to quality practice ground.

name: Charlotte Harbor Driving Range
address: 23411 Harbor View Rd, Port Charlotte, FL 33980
description: Charlotte Harbor Driving Range in Port Charlotte offers a straightforward outdoor practice experience without the overhead of a full country club facility. The mat bays provide a consistent hitting surface and give golfers of all levels a reliable place to warm up or work on their swings. Its accessible location in the Charlotte Harbor area makes it convenient for residents across Port Charlotte and Punta Gorda. It's a no-frills, community-focused range that keeps the local golf population sharp year-round.

name: Top of the Tee
address: 2260 Town Center Blvd, Fleming Island, FL 32003
description: Top of the Tee at Fleming Island Golf Club combines a Toptracer-powered range with evening lights, PGA professional instruction, and the on-site Hibernia Pub for post-round refreshments. The Toptracer system allows golfers to compete in virtual challenges, play simulated courses, or simply track real ball-flight data during practice. Multiple junior academy programs, including Operation 36, add a strong developmental dimension for young players. It's a well-rounded facility that blends competitive technology with a community club feel in Clay County.

name: Quail Heights Country Club
address: 161 SW Quail Heights Terrace, Lake City, FL 32025
description: Quail Heights Country Club in Lake City offers a challenging 18-hole championship layout with a mix of water hazards, sand traps, and rolling terrain that tests players of all ability levels. Both grass and mat tee options on the practice range give golfers flexibility in their warm-up routine. On-site dining and a full-service clubhouse create a country club atmosphere that remains accessible to the public. It's a well-regarded North Florida course that delivers a genuine golf club experience at a public green-fee price.

name: Astor Creek Golf & Country Club
address: 9138 Shinnecock Dr, Port St. Lucie, FL 34987
description: Astor Creek Golf and Country Club in Port St. Lucie is a private community club offering championship golf alongside tennis, fitness, dining, and a full social calendar. The club serves Kolter and Taylor Morrison home communities, providing residents a convenient on-property golf destination with a polished country club experience. Dining menus range from casual poolside bites to formal dinner service, reflecting the club's commitment to versatile hospitality. It's a self-contained lifestyle club for active adults who want golf and amenities in close proximity.

name: Hackaways Golf Driving Range
description: Hackaways Golf Driving Range in Belleview offers a traditional outdoor range experience with the added appeal of real grass hitting surfaces — a feature many dedicated golfers strongly prefer over mats. The no-frills format keeps the focus squarely on the practice itself, free from the distractions of a larger entertainment complex. Its Marion County location serves a broad region of Central Florida golfers who value authentic turf conditions for ball-striking work. It's a dependable local range that draws repeat visitors precisely because of its simplicity.

name: Belle Glade Municipal Golf Club
address: 2619 W Canal St N, Belle Glade, FL 33430
description: Belle Glade Municipal Golf Club is a publicly accessible course serving the rural agricultural community on the western shore of Lake Okeechobee. The municipal facility provides an affordable, accessible golf option for residents of Glades County and the surrounding region. Its community-focused mission makes it a vital recreational resource for an area that lacks the resort golf density found elsewhere in South Florida. The course offers a genuine local golf experience well off the beaten path of Florida's more famous golfing corridors.

name: TwinEagles Club
description: TwinEagles Club in Naples is an ultra-exclusive private club spread across 1,115 acres of natural Florida landscape, featuring two championship golf courses with both grass and mat practice options. The club's lifestyle amenities — including world-class dining, personalized service, and a tight-knit membership — make it as much a residential community as a golf destination. The courses wind through preserved wetlands and old-growth cypress, providing some of the most scenic and serene golf experiences in Southwest Florida. It's the definition of a luxury club, where every detail is curated for the enjoyment of its members.

name: Dean Riley's Golf Center, 388 Driving Range
description: Dean Riley's Golf Center in Panama City is a lighted outdoor driving range that serves as a convenient practice destination for Bay County golfers. The facility offers consistent hitting areas with evening lights extending play beyond sunset, making it practical for golfers with daytime commitments. Its straightforward format and well-maintained infrastructure have earned it a loyal following among regular local visitors. It's the kind of dependable neighborhood range that keeps a community's golfers active and engaged.

name: LaPlaya Golf Club
description: LaPlaya Golf Club in Naples is a resort-affiliated course offering a scenic coastal golf experience complemented by full dining and beverage services. Set within a luxury resort property, the course serves both hotel guests and local golfers seeking an elevated round with top-tier facilities nearby. The club's waterfront setting adds natural beauty to a layout that challenges players of all levels. For golfers who enjoy the combination of great golf and resort hospitality, LaPlaya delivers both in a prime Naples location.

name: Marriott Golf Academy
description: The Marriott Golf Academy in Orlando is a nationally recognized instruction center staffed by PGA and LPGA professionals, offering one-, two-, and three-day schools alongside private lessons and junior programs. The academy uses TrackMan technology and video analysis to provide data-driven coaching that accelerates improvement regardless of starting skill level. Grass tee hitting areas and on-site dining make it a complete destination for golfers looking to dedicate focused time to their game. Its affiliation with Marriott Vacation Club adds a luxurious hospitality layer that sets it apart from typical academies.

name: Stillwater Golf and Country Club
description: Stillwater Golf and Country Club in St. Johns offers a Toptracer-powered range with evening lighting, creating a modern and versatile practice experience within a private residential community. Members enjoy a full suite of club amenities including dining, competitive leagues, and community events throughout the year. The Toptracer system adds game-like challenges and detailed ball-flight data to range sessions, making practice more engaging and productive. It's an attractive club option for active adults in the rapidly growing St. Johns County area south of Jacksonville.

name: Stirling Park & Driving Range
description: Stirling Park Driving Range in Dunedin is a city-operated practice facility that provides a convenient, affordable hitting venue for golfers in Pinellas County's northern communities. The accessible format and public pricing make it an easy first stop for beginners or a regular warm-up spot for seasoned players. Its park setting gives the range a relaxed, open-air atmosphere that's distinctly different from a commercial facility. Dunedin's tight-knit, outdoor-focused community makes this a well-used local resource for golfers of all ages.

name: Blue Cypress Golf Course
description: Blue Cypress Golf Course in Jacksonville is a public facility featuring real grass tee surfaces that give ball-strikers the authentic feel and turf interaction missing from mat-only ranges. The course layout offers golfers a full round experience in a natural setting with tree-lined fairways and a variety of challenges. Its public-access format keeps it welcoming and affordable for a wide cross-section of Jacksonville-area golfers. It's a solid, genuine golf experience that appeals to traditionalists who prefer turf over technology.

name: Hunters Ridge Golf & Country Club
address: 12500 Hunters Ridge Blvd, Bonita Springs, FL 34135
description: Hunters Ridge Golf and Country Club in Bonita Springs is a private club offering a well-maintained championship golf course and full dining amenities within a gated community setting. The club fosters a strong sense of camaraderie among its members through organized tournaments, social events, and a friendly staff. Its Southwest Florida location provides a reliably pleasant climate for year-round golf, attracting both seasonal residents and permanent members. It's a comfortable, well-regarded private club with the feel of an established community institution.

name: Burnt Pine Golf Club
address: 3300 Burnt Pine Ln, Miramar Beach, FL 32550
description: Burnt Pine Golf Club at Sandestin is the most exclusive golf destination within the renowned Sandestin Golf and Beach Resort, featuring an Rees Jones-designed championship course celebrated for its strategic bunkering and demanding par-5 holes. Membership offers access to a prestigious private club within one of the Panhandle's most sought-after resort communities. Dining and social programming at Burnt Pine reflect the elevated expectations of its members, blending golfing excellence with resort-quality hospitality. For golfers seeking a premium Emerald Coast club experience, Burnt Pine represents the pinnacle.

name: Adventureland
address: 6440 S Florida Ave, Floral City, FL 34436
description: Adventureland in Floral City is a multi-activity destination that includes a driving range within a family-friendly recreational setting in Citrus County. The outdoor format keeps things casual and approachable, making it a comfortable option for golfers who want to practice without the intensity of a dedicated golf facility. Its location in the heart of Florida's Nature Coast gives it a scenic, unhurried character well suited to the local community. It's a relaxed spot where families and casual golfers can enjoy the game as part of a broader recreational outing.

name: UNF Driving Range
description: The UNF Golf Complex in Jacksonville is a public-access driving range and nine-hole par-3 course affiliated with the University of North Florida. Lighted bays allow evening practice sessions, and professional instruction is available for players seeking personalized coaching in an academic setting. The facility is open to the public and does not require tee time reservations for the par-3 course, keeping it flexible and accessible. It's a standout value for Jacksonville golfers who want quality practice infrastructure at a reasonable price.

name: Broward Golf Center
address: 1000 Coconut Creek Blvd, Coconut Creek, FL 33066
description: Broward Golf Center in Coconut Creek is a premier practice and teaching facility offering both grass and mat tee options, lighted bays for evening use, and professional instruction available seven days a week. The center is centrally located in Broward County, making it accessible from Boca Raton to Fort Lauderdale and points between. Lesson packages are available for all skill levels, and the organized, well-maintained facility reflects its reputation as a serious training destination. It's a step above the typical local driving range, purpose-built for golfers who want to improve.

name: US 1 Golf Center, Inc.
description: US 1 Golf Center in Rockledge serves Brevard County golfers with a lighted, dual-surface driving range featuring both grass and mat hitting options. The facility's evening lights make it one of the more practical year-round practice options on Florida's Space Coast. Its combination of grass tees and consistent mat surfaces gives golfers flexibility depending on what aspect of their game they're working on. It's a solid local option for Melbourne-area players who need reliable, accessible range time.

name: U.S. 1 Golf
description: Nestled between Vero Beach and Fort Pierce on the Treasure Coast, U.S. 1 Golf offers a full-service range experience with both grass and mat tee options, on-site food and beverage, and a setting that blends tradition with a commitment to continuous improvement. The range markets itself as a beacon for golfers of all experience levels, providing a welcoming environment regardless of skill. Its Treasure Coast location fills a gap in quality practice facilities between Palm Beach and the Space Coast. The combination of real turf, dining, and a community-oriented attitude makes it a standout along the U.S. 1 corridor.

name: The Club at Hidden Creek
description: The Club at Hidden Creek in Navarre is a public 18-hole championship course designed by Ron Garl, stretching 6,823 yards through lush, rolling Northwest Florida terrain. The course is widely praised for its excellent playing conditions, scenic landscape, and strategic layout that rewards thoughtful shot selection. On-site dining and direct online booking — always at the best available rate — make it a convenient and value-conscious choice for Panhandle golfers. Its reputation for exceptional course conditioning draws players from across the greater Pensacola metro.

name: Terra Ceia Bay Country Club
address: 2802 Terra Ceia Bay Blvd, Palmetto, FL 34221
description: Terra Ceia Bay Country Club in Palmetto offers a public golf experience with a private club feel, providing golfers access to a well-maintained course set against the scenic backdrop of Terra Ceia Bay. The club hosts an active social calendar and a variety of events that foster a genuine sense of community among its members and guests. On-site dining adds convenience, and the club's open-to-public policy ensures accessibility without sacrificing atmosphere. It's a hidden gem in Manatee County that delivers more than most players expect from a public facility.

name: Southwinds Golf Course
description: Southwinds Golf Course in Boca Raton is a Palm Beach County-operated course with a natural setting teeming with wildlife — Canadian geese, otters, and a variety of Florida bird species frequently share the fairways with golfers. On-site dining and a frequent player card program add value for regular visitors. The course provides an affordable, publicly accessible round in an area where golf can often come at a premium price. Its natural surroundings and peaceful atmosphere make for a refreshingly unhurried golf experience in South Florida.

name: The Country Club of Mount Dora
address: 1900 Country Club Blvd, Mt Dora, FL 32757
description: The Country Club of Mount Dora is a semi-private facility offering public tee times on a scenic course alongside a bar and grill with casual lakeside dining. Flexible membership options provide preferred tee sheet access and year-round perks for those who play regularly. The Beacon 19 Bar and Grill serves cold drinks and casual eats with relaxed views of the surrounding Central Florida landscape. It's a welcoming club in one of Florida's most charming small towns, combining solid golf with small-town hospitality.

name: Pensacola Golf Center
description: Pensacola Golf Center is a neighborhood-scale driving range offering both grass and mat hitting options alongside evening lighting for extended practice sessions. No reservations are required, making it one of the most accessible and spontaneous practice destinations in the Pensacola area. PGA instruction is available for players who want personalized coaching in a relaxed, local setting. Its long-standing community presence makes it a familiar institution for golfers across Escambia County.

name: Golf World Discount Shop and Driving Range
address: 19001 N Tamiami Trl #1, North Fort Myers, FL 33903
description: Golf World Discount in North Fort Myers has served the area for over 30 years, combining a full-service lighted driving range with a retail shop stocked with discounted golf equipment and accessories. The range is open from 9 AM to 8 PM daily, with lights extending the practice window into the evening hours. Both grass and mat hitting options are available, giving golfers flexibility depending on their practice goals. It's a practical, value-focused destination for Lee County golfers who want quality practice gear at competitive prices.

name: Placid Lakes Country Club
address: 3601 Placid Lakes Blvd, Lake Placid, FL 33852
description: Placid Lakes Golf Course in Lake Placid is part of the Citrus Golf Trail and is recognized as one of the finest courses in the Highlands County area. The layout is open to the public and delivers a genuine country club experience at an accessible price point. Rolling terrain, scenic lake views, and a well-maintained course make each round memorable in a region known for its natural Florida character. On-site dining adds convenience, and the club's reputation for hospitality keeps golfers coming back.

name: The Saints at Port St. Lucie Golf Course
address: 2601 SE Morningside Blvd, Port St. Lucie, FL 34952
description: The Saints at Port St. Lucie is a public course offering both grass and mat tee options alongside on-site dining, making it a versatile and complete golf destination on the Treasure Coast. The course is well regarded for its conditioning and the variety its layout presents to golfers of differing abilities. Tee time availability and competitive pricing make it a frequent choice for St. Lucie County residents looking for reliable public golf. It's a solid, well-rounded facility that serves the local community faithfully.

name: Coral Isle Golf Center
description: Coral Isle Golf Center in Naples offers a dual-surface range — with both grass and mat hitting areas — alongside a full-service pro shop and PGA-trained professional instruction. Scott Moser leads the teaching program, bringing a personalized approach to lessons for golfers across all skill levels. New and used club sales, gift certificates, and golf packages round out the retail and services offering. It's a locally rooted, community-focused range that serves as a dependable practice and equipment resource in Southwest Florida.

name: Cypresswood Golf and Country Club
description: Cypresswood Golf and Country Club in Winter Haven is a member-focused facility with a real-grass course and an on-site pub open to the public, featuring live music on Thursday, Friday, and Saturday evenings. The course requires two players per cart and operates on a welcoming, semi-public model that balances member exclusivity with accessibility. Its family-friendly atmosphere and regular live entertainment give it a social energy beyond typical golf clubs. It's a warm, community-minded option in the heart of Polk County's lake district.

name: Gator Lakes Golf Course
address: 403 Walkup Way, Bldg. 91300, Hurlburt Field, FL 32544
description: Gator Lakes Golf Course at Hurlburt Field in the Florida Panhandle is an 18-hole military-affiliated course open to the public, blending a challenging layout with Toptracer range technology and evening-lit hitting bays. The course winds through scenic natural terrain and is designed to engage golfers at all skill levels with a balance of risk and reward. An on-site restaurant and bar provide post-round comfort, and the Toptracer range allows both competitive virtual challenges and detailed practice analysis. It's one of the more complete golf facilities in Okaloosa County, combining a great course with modern range amenities.

name: Mission Valley Golf & Country Club
description: Mission Valley Golf and Country Club in Nokomis is a member-owned facility with a full-service golf operation including PGA instruction, custom club fitting, and a well-maintained course set in the quiet communities south of Sarasota. The club hosts a range of golf and social events throughout the year, nurturing a genuine sense of community among its members. Dining at the clubhouse and a fully stocked golf shop complete the on-property experience. It's a mid-scale private club that delivers consistent quality in a relaxed, friendly atmosphere.

name: ZenWoods Golf Club
address: 95 S Golf Harbor Path, Inverness, FL 34450
description: ZenWoods Golf Club in Inverness offers a golf experience with evening-lit facilities and on-site dining in the scenic Nature Coast region of Citrus County. The club provides a peaceful, unhurried environment that complements the area's natural character. Membership and daily play options cater to both full-time residents and seasonal visitors drawn to Central Florida's lake country. It's a laid-back, community-minded facility that takes the stress out of the game and lets golfers simply enjoy themselves.

name: Westside Golf Center
description: Westside Golf Center on Jacksonville's west side is a lighted outdoor driving range offering a straightforward, no-frills practice experience for golfers in the greater Jacksonville metro area. Evening lights extend usable hours into the night, accommodating players with daytime work schedules. Its simple, community-focused format makes it an unpretentious and accessible option for golfers of all ability levels. It's the kind of neighborhood range that serves its local community reliably without any fanfare.

name: Lake Bess Golf Club
address: 218 Golf Aire Blvd, Winter Haven, FL 33884
description: Lake Bess Golf Club in Winter Haven is the only nine-hole course in the area offering both a driving range and on-site golf professional for lessons. The club's compact layout is ideal for beginners learning course management and experienced players looking to sharpen their scoring game on a shorter track. Lesson packages from the club pro add a valuable instructional dimension to what is otherwise a relaxed, community-scale facility. It's a friendly, accessible option in Polk County's golf-rich lake region.

name: Royal Poinciana Golf Club
description: Founded in 1969, Royal Poinciana Golf Club in Naples is a private, invitation-only club with two meticulously maintained 18-hole championship courses and a rich membership culture that includes HydroGrid soft tennis and pickleball courts. The club has attracted members from around the world over its five-plus decades of operation, fostering a globally diverse yet deeply collegial community. On-site dining, social events, and world-class course conditioning make membership at Royal Poinciana a genuinely coveted experience. It's one of Naples' most distinguished private clubs, beloved for its exclusivity and consistent excellence.

name: Blackwater Golf Club
description: Blackwater Golf Club in Crestview — formerly Foxwood Country Club — has been comprehensively renovated and reopened as a fully public 18-hole championship course with a Toptracer-equipped driving range and lighted practice facilities. The redesigned course brings fresh energy to Northwest Florida golf, offering a competitive layout that welcomes players of all skill levels. Toptracer technology on the range adds interactive game options and accurate ball-tracking to practice sessions. It's a revitalized local gem that gives Okaloosa County golfers a quality venue with modern amenities.

name: Pensacola Golf at Cypress Lakes Golf Club
description: Cypress Lakes Golf Club in Cantonment is an 18-hole course with grass tees and a commitment to exceptional service and course conditions just north of Pensacola. The club hosts monthly member events and corporate tournaments, and its staff-led instruction program serves golfers at all stages of their development. A welcoming atmosphere and competitive membership pricing make it an attractive private option for Escambia and Santa Rosa County golfers. It consistently draws strong reviews for course quality and the professionalism of its team.

name: Suncoast Golf Center
description: Suncoast Golf Center in Sarasota is a well-lit evening range with Toptracer technology, mat hitting bays, on-site food, and a pro shop — a comprehensive practice package in one facility. Toptracer turns routine range sessions into interactive experiences with virtual course play and real-time ball-tracking data. The center is open Monday through Saturday until 9 PM, making it one of the more accessible evening golf venues in the Sarasota-Bradenton metro. It's a practical and entertaining destination for golfers who want more from their range time than just bucket-and-ball.

name: La Cita Golf & Country Club
description: La Cita Golf and Country Club in Titusville is a semi-private club offering 18 holes of championship golf alongside dining in a community-oriented setting on Florida's Space Coast. The club's combination of member exclusivity and public accessibility makes it a practical option for both regular members and visiting golfers. Titusville's location near the Kennedy Space Center gives the area a unique character, and La Cita serves as one of the region's primary golf institutions. It's a well-regarded course for players across Brevard County's northern communities.

name: Singleton Golf Driving Range

The range is currently building its online presence and program offerings, with golf instruction planned as a key component of its services. Its Brevard County location fills a gap in dedicated practice facilities in the northern Space Coast area. It's an emerging local range worth watching as it continues to develop its full range of services.

name: Indian Hills Golf Course
description: Indian Hills Golf Course in Fort Pierce is a City of Fort Pierce-operated municipal facility offering accessible, community-focused golf on Florida's Treasure Coast. Its municipal roots give it a neighborhood character that's refreshingly unpretentious compared to more commercial golf operations. It's a steady community asset for St. Lucie County golfers seeking a no-frills, accessible round.

name: Palatka Golf Course
description: Palatka Golf Club is recognized as the most historic public golf course in Florida and has earned a national ranking among America's top 30 municipal courses by Links Magazine. The vintage layout offers an authentic, traditional golf experience at a price point that's rare in the current market — firmly establishing its reputation as one of the best golf values in the Southeast. On-site dining complements a round that takes players through decades of Florida golf history. Golfers who appreciate the character of a truly old-school course will find Palatka genuinely special.

name: Cocoa Beach Country Club
address: 5000 Tom Warriner Blvd, Cocoa Beach, FL 32931
description: Cocoa Beach Country Club is a city-operated public facility offering golf, dining, and recreational amenities in one of Brevard County's most beloved coastal communities. The course provides affordable public golf with on-site food service in a setting that captures the laid-back character of Florida's Space Coast. Its municipal ownership ensures broad community access, making it a popular option for local residents year-round. The club's beach-adjacent location gives it a distinctly relaxed, coastal vibe that's hard to replicate elsewhere.

name: Eagle Lakes Golf Club
description: Eagle Lakes Golf Club in Naples is a daily-fee public course recently renovated with new Bimini Bermuda fairways, featuring a par-72 layout designed around 21 lakes with five tee options from 4,466 to 7,144 yards. The course provides abundant wildlife sightings — including the American Bald Eagle for which it is named — and an authentic Florida Everglades atmosphere that few other courses in the region can match. A full bar and restaurant on-site make it a complete stop for both golf and dining. PGA instruction from an on-site professional rounds out the practice and development offerings.

name: Costa Del Sol Golf Club
address: 100 Costa Del Sol Blvd, Doral, FL 33178
description: Costa Del Sol Golf Club in Doral is described as a hidden gem within the oldest residential community in the City of Doral, offering 18 holes of public golf with a full-service driving range, practice bunkers, and an on-site restaurant and bar. The course provides affordable public golf in a market dominated by premium private and resort clubs, making it an attractive value for Miami-area golfers. A fully stocked pro shop and proximity to Miami International Airport make it a convenient stop for both locals and traveling golfers. It's a neighborhood course with a friendly, welcoming culture.

name: Hibiscus Golf Club
description: Hibiscus Golf Club in Naples has recently reopened its Brooks Bar and Grill, adding a full dining experience to a course that has long been valued by local golfers for its accessibility and consistent conditions. The course offers a straightforward, enjoyable round with instruction available from the on-site teaching professional. A frequent player program rewards regular visitors with meaningful savings over time. It's a dependable, community-focused public course in a city better known for its high-end private clubs.

name: The Shores of North River Golf Club
address: 1827 NW Pine Lake Dr, Stuart, FL 34994
description: The Shores of North River Golf Club in Stuart is a public course with real grass tee surfaces and on-site dining, offering a welcoming environment for golfers across the Treasure Coast. Professional instruction is available for players at any skill level, from beginners to competitive amateurs. The club's natural setting along the North River adds a scenic quality that elevates what would otherwise be a pleasant but straightforward round.

name: Magnolia Point Golf and Country Club
address: 3670 Clubhouse Dr, Green Cove Springs, FL 32043

The course has earned a strong local reputation as a true golfer's paradise, with a layout that challenges players of varying skill levels. Dining and social programming give members a broad range of reasons to visit beyond golf alone. It's a full-featured country club in a part of Northeast Florida that continues to attract new residents.

name: Topgolf Panama City Beach
address: 15475 Topgolf Way, Panama City Beach, FL 32413
description: Topgolf Panama City Beach brings the brand's signature multi-level hitting bay experience to the Florida Panhandle, complete with Toptracer-powered scoring games, a sports bar, and a full restaurant overlooking the bays. The venue is lit for evening play and operates seven days a week, with expansive hours that accommodate both daytime and late-night visits. Seasonal promotions and exclusive email offers keep the experience fresh for repeat visitors. It's a premier entertainment destination on the Gulf Coast that pairs serious technology with a party-forward atmosphere.

name: Abacoa Golf Club
description: Abacoa Golf Club in Jupiter was the final course designed by renowned architect Joe Lee before his passing, and it stands as a fitting capstone — a public course that consistently ranks among the finest in South Florida. The design incorporates sloping terrain, lakes, and strategic bunkering to create a layout that rewards course management over raw power. Grass tees, on-site dining, and a pro shop make it a complete golf destination in Palm Beach County's northern communities. For public golfers who want a genuinely great course without a private club price tag, Abacoa is a must-play.

name: Duran Golf Club
description: Duran Golf Club in Viera is a dedicated golf destination on Florida's Atlantic coast, designed to create memorable experiences for players of all skill levels through a combination of scenic design and genuine hospitality. The course winds through Brevard County's natural landscape with water features and challenging greens that reward precision play. On-site food ordering and a full-service clubhouse make the visit convenient and enjoyable from arrival to departure. It's a well-regarded public course that reflects the quality standards of one of Central Florida's east coast's best residential communities.

name: Aqua Golf Driving Range & Pro Shop

No grass tees are offered, but the mat hitting surfaces are well-maintained and the overall setup is consistently praised for quality and value. It's a high-reputation range with a loyal following across Broward and Miami-Dade counties.

Grass tees and full dining services complement the high-quality course conditions that Lely Resort has become known for. Membership options unlock additional perks and preferred tee times, but public access keeps the courses broadly available. It's a premium golfing experience in Naples that delivers genuine value for the quality on offer.

name: Lady Lake Golf Driving Range

Its charitable mission gives it a community character that few ranges can match. For golfers in The Villages corridor who want to practice while supporting local causes, this range is a uniquely meaningful choice.

Membership options provide year-round access and community connection in one of Florida's least commercialized golfing regions. It's a genuine off-the-beaten-path course for players who want to escape the crowds of Florida's more popular golf markets.
